title: PebbleTown
description: Create Vanilla+ focused modpack, with quality of life and optimization improvements. Meant for the Pebbleverse server only.
body:
(description not valid for the new w.i.p. alpha version)
## About this modpack  
This modpack focus on [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), it's addons such as [The Factory Must Grow](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tfmg) and [Steam 'n' Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails), in depth exploration with new world generation and dungeons, while also having optimization mods to make sure most people can run it.

## F.A.Q
The minimun amount of alocated RAM is 4 GBs, **5 GBs is reccomended** for singleplayer.  
You can switch between the different first person modes by pressing the F6 key.  
To swap build modes press the right Alt key.  
You can crawl by pressing left Alt key.

## Disclaimer
This is the client side of the modpack for the [**Pebbleverse**](https://discord.gg/pebbleverse) server.  
Nothing is monetized, no copyright infringement intended.
